subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 260428446 is not a GRB
body:
Sheila McBreen (UCD/MPE) reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 260428446
at 05:14:04.22 UT on 03 April 2009, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due
to a terrestrial gamma-ray flash."
